Off Calendar Jul-16-2014 Text Ruling

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jul-09-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and issuance of new birth certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
Petitioner Denyse Chaves present in court assisted by Spanish Interpreter Carla Lopez.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of gender and issuance of new birth certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for changing Gender from male to female and issuance of new birth certificate.
Order for change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate signed in Court.

SETTING OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR CHANGE OF GENDER AND ISSUANCE OF NEW BIRTH CERTIFICATE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and issuance of new birth certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry Dorfman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840
Petitioner Denyse Chaves present in court assisted by Spanish Interpreter Carla Lopez.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed change of gender and issuance of new birth certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for changing Gender from male to female and issuance of new birth certificate.
Order for change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate signed in Court.
